general.title: Manual Phenotyping [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions: Define and apply manual phenotypes to a dataset.  A new column with the annotation "Manual Annotation Name" will be added. \ Please refer to DUET Documentation, GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Upstream Dataset Pattern
parameters.description: Filename pattern to match the upstream dataset file.

parameters.name: Phenotypes Code Pattern
parameters.description: Filename pattern to match the phenotypes code file.

parameters.name: Classification Column Prefix
parameters.description: The prefix to prepend to a feature (marker) name in "phenotype_code". Column names representing features in the phenotype name might have a common prefix and suffix. For example, the column name can be "marker_CD4_classification". In this case, the prefix is "marker_" and the suffix is "_classification", and the code should only mention CD4+ or CD4-.

parameters.name: Classification Column Suffix
parameters.description: The suffix to append to a feature (marker) name in "phenotype_code". Column names representing features in the phenotype name might have a common prefix and suffix. For example, the column name can be "marker_CD4_classification". In this case, the prefix is "marker_" and the suffix is "_classification", and the code should only mention CD4+ or CD4-.

parameters.name: Allow Multiple Phenotypes
parameters.description: Allow a given cell to match multiple phenotype_code. The resulting label will join all the "phenotype_name" using a ','. If set to False, the resulting cell will be marked as "no_label"

parameters.name: Manual Annotation Name
parameters.description: The name of the new column (annotation) to be added to the dataset with the defined "phenotype_name"s as values. Cells that do not match any defined phenotype will be assiged "no_label".
